Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-16-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Defendant Victor Cheuk Leung Tangs Responses To Form Interrogatories Set One And Special Interrogatories Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - Stuart R. Curran, Deputy City Attorney (415) 509 7720 appearing for Plaintiffs.
Laura Christie, Esq., of Clapp, Moroney, Bellagamba, Vucinich, Beeman & Scheley appearing for
Defendants Victor Cheuk Leung Tang, dba Current Construction. Counsel appearig via CourtCall.

PLAINTIFF ROMULO SARMIENTO and ERLINDA SARMIENTO's Motion To Compel Defendant Victor Cheuk Leung Tangs Responses To Form Interrogatories Set One And Special Interrogatories Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions are heard this day.
After argument of respective counsel the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling.
The motions to compel are granted in part and denied in part. The Motion to have RFAs deemed admitted is denied as defendant provided verified responses without objections on March 2, 2016. The Motions to Compel Responses to RFP and Form and Special Interrogatories are granted. All objections are waived. Defendant did not provide verified responses. Verified, objection-free responses must be served within 3 weeks of the notice on entry of this order. If verified, objection-free responses are not received in plaintiffs' counsel's office on or before that deadline, sanctions in the amount of $4,145 are awarded against Defendant Tang and in favor of plaintiff, due and payable within 5 day of the deadline.
Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro-tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Not Reported. =302/J
